name: houndstone
flavor_texts: Houndstone spends most of its time sleeping in graveyards. Among all the dog Pokémon, this one is most loyal to its master.
A lovingly mourned Pokémon was reborn as Houndstone. It doesn’t like anyone touching the protuberance atop its head.
text: Houndstone is the Ghost Dog Pokémon. It is a ghost-type Pokémon. Abilities: sand-rush, fluffy (hidden). Base stats — HP: 72, Attack: 101, Defense: 100, Sp. Atk: 50, Sp. Def: 97, Speed: 68. Evolution line: greavard → houndstone. Lore: Houndstone spends most of its time sleeping in graveyards. Among all the dog Pokémon, this one is most loyal to its master. A lovingly mourned Pokémon was reborn as Houndstone. It doesn’t like anyone touching the protuberance atop its head.
